hooks.command: export PATH=/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH && bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/setup.sh" && echo '' && echo '=== Git Status ===' && git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" status --short && echo '' && echo '=== Current Branch ===' && git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" branch --show-current && echo '' && echo '=== Recent Commits ===' && git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" log --oneline -5 && echo '' && echo '=== Java ===' && java -version 2>&1 && echo '' && echo '=== mvnd ===' && (mvnd --version 2>&1 | head -1 || echo 'mvnd not in PATH')

export PATH=/usr/lib/jvm/openjdk-26/bin:/root/.mvnd/mvnd-2.0.0-rc-3/bin:/opt/mvnd2/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:$PATH && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && python3 -c "import sys,json; ti=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}); f=ti.get('path','') or ti.get('file_path',''); exit(0 if f.endswith('.java') else 1)" && mvnd spotless:apply -q || true
